_README: Template for the single runtime-settings file. Copy to config/engine.json to override the built-in defaults (optional — a missing file just uses these same values). Operator-tunable knobs only; SECRETS (DATABASE_URL, R2_*, *_API_KEY, UPSTASH_*) stay in .env. The asset universe stays in config/assets.json (synced from Neon engine_assets). Keys are the legacy env-var names; the real environment overrides any value here. The admin dashboard 'set config' command writes to config/engine.json (which is gitignored, so its edits persist across deploys).
